author.bio: Co-founder & CEO at @webflow by day, secret Soviet spy by night. Aspiring to be extraordinarily kind. http://pronoun.is/he
author.name: Vlad Magdalin

content.text:
Is your child texting about JAVASCRIPT?

bff → bae function, fam
lol → logical operators? lit
dtf → dev tools fan
tfw → thirsty for wasm
brb → bet reason’s better
wtf → webpack them files
omfg → overload my function, guys
wwjddd → what would john-david dalton do
